# Anirban Pay

> Anirban Pay is an open-source, self-hosted payment automation platform. Plugin-powered, developer-friendly, and forever free. Forked from PipraPay.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Anirban Pay — the eternal, self-hosted payment gateway.
- [Features](/features): Plugin architecture, gateway support, automation, and security features.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free core platform with optional premium add-ons.
- [Docs](/docs): Installation, configuration, and developer guides.
- [Plugins](/plugins): Official and community plugins for WHMCS, WooCommerce, Blesta, and more.
- [Blog](/blog): Release notes, announcements, and integration guides.
- [About](/about): Project story, mission, and the team behind it.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
